An '''asteroid field''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] in the [[N'zoth system/Legends|N'zoth system]]. Located in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], it occupied the seventh [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[C'rel]].
